nodes.context: Italian-American recruitment gang for the Lucchese crime family, operating in Yonkers, Westchester County, the Bronx, and Upper West Side.
One of the Five Families of the American Mafia, based in New York City.
One of the Five Families of the American Mafia, based in New York City.
One of the Five Families of the American Mafia, based in New York City.
Rival gang to the Tanglewood Boys, involved in conflicts in New York City.

edges.context: The Tanglewood Boys served as a recruitment gang or 'farm team' for the Lucchese crime family.
The Tanglewood Boys had conflicts with the Albanian Boys, including mistaken identity murders.
A sit-down between Tanglewood Boys members occurred at a bar owned by Bonanno crime family soldier Vincent Basciano.
Tanglewood Boys member John Petrucelli murdered Paul Cicero, a cousin of Genovese crime family associate Gene Gallo, in retaliation for a shooting.
